headline: Managing Director UK at Elevision
summary:
I have over 25 years of business experience, and have worked in, and have extensive knowledge of multiple business sectors – business management, sales, business development, new business acquisition, planning, project management and business transformation – across the UK and the Middle East region.

For the last 10 years I have led the growth and development of Elan Media as it’s COO, and positioned myself as one of the leading proponents of media across the Middle East. 

At Elan Media I developed the growth, sales and business development strategies and implementation programmes that grew the business exponentially over a 10 year period. The introduction of new business lines and a partial diversification away from the original core business were key to this development. This diversification led to an internal, as well as external, repositioning of the business. This process resulted in:

- Successful bid for the FIFA World Cup 2022 “Outdoor Advertising Media” tender, with a value of QR 
 200m / £40m.
- The launch and full build and deployment of Digital OOH solutions for the first time in Qatar. The total CAPEX deployed for these projects was QR 83m / £16.5m.
- Introduction and delivery of data led planning solutions for the first time in the GCC region.
- Introduction of Programmatic DOOH to Qatar with a GCC wide sales focus.
- Multiple business development successes and new format introductions.
- Responsible for the creation of Elan’s in house Digital agency. 

My network and clients have described me as inspirational, creative and thought provoking and of operating with clear leadership and vision. 

Colleagues have described me as a forward thinking, dedicated and an energetic leader.

The values that I endeavour to work to are; Honesty, Integrity, Attention to Detail and a Sense of Humour.
 
I can be contacted at:

jamiehball@hotmail.com
07572 460521

experiences.title: Managing Director UK
experiences.description: Building on Elevision's ever-expanding network of 1300+ digital screens in the UAE, our UK expansion provides UK property managers with a world-class data-led communication platform that delivers real-time media and communication to their tenants and visitors in a variety of bespoke formats. Elevision raises the bar for community-centric communications through our proprietary CMS system and innovative content solutions. In addition to tenant communications, our platform offers marketers unparalleled access to a vibrant audience of busy professionals, young families, and influential consumers in a captive and distraction-free environment, offering brands unprecedented exposure. Our solutions aid both property managers and marketers to deliver consistent and effective communications to their target audience. By using real-time content delivery systems, Elevision enables clients to deliver dynamic, custom-tailored content specific to their audience and location. Show less

experiences.title: Open to conversations
experiences.description: In December 2021, after 10 years, I left Elan Media and the Middle East to relocate back to the UK.  I promised myself and my family some time off to reconnect and readjust to life at home. I’m now recharged and ready to actively start looking for a new role and start the next chapter of my career and am open to any and all new opportunities that I can make a positive contribution to.

experiences.title: Chief Operating Officer, Media
experiences.description: I am the COO of a pioneering regional media company operating throughout the Middle East. We fill a unique position in the industry through our multi platform channel mix. In the last 8 years Elan have successfully grown and developed not just our own business but the markets in which we operate. We have introduced world class Digital Out of Home, grown our OOH footprint, and brought real life, real time data to the region. Our success has been based upon a combination of hard work, innovation and not being afraid to learn from other regions and companies that operate in the same space as Elan. It is also based upon people. We have brought together a fantastic blend of nationalities and cultures that work together seamlessly to deliver a common goal; to not only make Elan a region leading operator in Media and Cinema, but to continually strive to be the best that we can in all that we do. Having spent 27 years in media, working in TV, OOH, Digital OOH, Online and Cinema I have enjoyed adapting to new challenges as the media world has evolved. In my role with Elan, and working in Qatar, I have had the opportunity to embrace new cultures and have been privileged to have been given the chance to take control of a business that was not only ready to change, but prepared to adjust to and grasp that change through innovation and diversification. In Qatar, we have the World Cup to look forward to in 2022, which offers a myriad of development and media opportunities for Elan and our regional and global partners in technology and advertising. So, as we emerge from a post lockdown, post COVID world there is hope, fear, new routines, restoring forgotten routines, reaching out to all members of society, hindsight, gratitude, love, and a new normal to understand. As we dust ourselves off and look towards this new reality, there is an opportunity to embrace and share all that we have learnt, and for me, media and advertising plays a central part in that process. Show less

recommendations:
Trevor H.

Quote: "Inspirational leaders are value-driven leading from a deep sense of purpose and responsibility to create positive change. They have a clear understanding of what their values are and dont cave under pressure in situations where theyd need to sacrifice their values to achieve a result." We had the privilege together to deliver an extremely large first to market digital media footprint with partners during the mega mall of Doha Festival City Mall, in Qatar, which opened in April 2017. A footprint across 240,000 sqm incorporating 1st to market digital innovation legacy. Without Jamie's passion, belief, and leadership this never would have materialised. Jamie Ball, is one of these uniquely inspiring leaders, who was inspirational, highly creative, thought provoking whilst striving to deliver overall value creation through experiences, places, people. Any organisation would be extremely fortunate to obtain Jamie's strategic leadership abilities, and team engagement skills as a complete package in driving amazing stakeholder engagement with positive outcomes. Highly recommend!

Laetitia Lim

I got the chance to work with Jamie at the time he was COO of Elan Media. At Quividi, we were super excited and honoured to have been chosen by Jamie and his team to launch realtime first party data, a first of its kind initiative in the region. Jamie's vision and leadership has positioned Elan Media as the leading DOOH premium network in the region, delivering a unique customer experience. I enjoyed very much collaborating with Jamie during his time at Elan Media.

Trevor H.

Quote: "Inspirational leaders are value-driven leading from a deep sense of purpose and responsibility to create positive change. They have a clear understanding of what their values are and don’t cave under pressure in situations where they’d need to sacrifice their values to achieve a result." We had the privilege together to deliver an extremely large first to market digital media footprint with partners during the mega mall of Doha Festival City Mall, in Qatar, which opened in April 2017. A footprint across 240,000 sqm incorporating 1st to market digital innovation legacy. Without Jamie's passion, belief, and leadership this never would have materialised. Jamie Ball, is one of these uniquely inspiring leaders, who was inspirational, highly creative, thought provoking whilst striving to deliver overall value creation through experiences, places, people. Any organisation would be extremely fortunate to obtain Jamie's strategic leadership abilities, and team engagement skills as a complete package in driving amazing stakeholder engagement with positive outcomes. Highly recommend!
